source_intake_record.raw_question_text: When an unsymmetrical alkene such as propene is treated with N-bromosuccinimide in aqueous dimethyl sulfoxide, the major product has the bromine atom bonded to the less highly substituted carbon atom. Is the following one Markovnikov or non-Markovnikov orientation? <image_1>
